full_text:
Cell Cycle project


Alva’s MSc thesis progress
9.12

Agenda

Main goals of the thesis
Criteria to classify samples in distinct groups
Immune composition analysis
Spatial analysis with K-Means and LDA
Decisions on next steps

Main goals of the thesis project

Investigate the tumor immune microenvironment in HR-proficient HGSC IDS samples using Oncosys-OVA clinical trial data to analyze its composition after chemotherapy and its impact on clinical outcomes.

2. Criteria for calculating PFS groups

HRP 
Patients who did not receive PARP inhibitors
2 samples dropped - necrotic 
 -> 19 patients in cohort

PFS is calculated based on the following criteria:
33rd percentile distribution
Categorized into short (6), medium (6), and long (7) groups
 -> 13 patients (short and long)

3. Immune composition analysis

Cell phenotyping has been performed and visually validated for distinct phenotypes

Endothelial cells % shows a higher trend in the Short PFS samples

Immune functional states have been assigned based on gated marker combinations

Immune functional states have been assigned based on gated marker combinations

4. Spatial exploration

RCNs were computed with 40 pixel radius and clustered with K-Means (k=10)

n=19

The abundance of various clusters significantly differs in both PFS groups

n=13

z-scored by RCN

Short PFS (n=6) 

Long PFS (n=7)

Clusters with a significant difference

Clusters showing an interesting trend

There is a significant difference in the proportional abundance of these RCNs

n=13

The Endothelial cluster (5) shows different distribution patterns

S084 (short PFS group) S100 (long PFS group)

CD31 
PanCK 
Endothelial cluster (5)

Short

Short

Long

Stroma - no immune infiltration (2) is highly correlated with endothelial cells (5) in the short PFS samples, showing opposite trend in the long PFS samples.

n=13

Endothelial cells (5) strongly correlate with TSI (1) in the Long PFS samples, showing opposite trend to the short PFS samples

n=13

Non-infiltrated stroma (2) and infiltrated-stroma (9) are highly correlated with CD163- macrophages (4) in the short PFS samples, showing opposite trends in the long PFS samples.

n=13

Spatial LDA

LDA RCNs computed with 40px radius and K-Means clustering (k=10)

LDA RCNs are showing similar trends as the spatial count RCNs

2 - TSI, similar to spatial count

n=13

similar to spatial count clusters
